strengths: Solid distributed-systems and high-throughput backend foundation: production microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Direct fintech-domain exposure at RIDE Capital (investment platform, TDD-driven delivery) and Optilyz (pricing optimization across countries)
Early hands-on contribution to agentic infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing awareness of the technology space the role requires
concerns: No demonstrated engineering leadership at any scale: no evidence of managing, hiring, or developing a team of any size, let alone scaling from 10 to 30+ engineers
Agentic AI experience is shallow and very recent (~6 months at re:cinq as an individual contributor); far short of the production multi-agent systems at commercial scale the role requires
Currently on an open-ended career gap with no stated technical direction; most senior roles are short-tenured (6 months at re:cinq, 15 months at RIDE), raising continuity questions
response.justification: Bogdan is an experienced individual contributor with a credible backend and fintech foundation, but the resume provides no evidence of the organizational leadership, strategic ownership, or production-grade agentic AI experience that a CTO role at this stage demands; the gap between his current seniority level and the executive scope of the position is too large to bridge with the experience presented.
